caption: A woman with long dark hair wears a striped shirt and black over-ear headphones while speaking. She is positioned in front of a light-colored wall and a yellow curtain with a blue edge on the left side of the frame. A neutral-colored surface is visible behind her on the right. The woman looks directly forward, her mouth moving as she speaks across the sequence. Small earrings are visible on her ears. In the bottom left corner of each frame, the on-screen text "Nancy Ganza" appears in a small, white font. Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in a static position, with only her facial expressions and mouth movements changing as she continues to talk.
